memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_CANOpenNode *node, uint32_t cob_id, const uint8_t *data, uint8_t len)
memberdef.name: canopen_queue_tx

briefdescription.para: Helper function to queue a CAN transmit frame.
Helper function to find an Object Dictionary entry.

simplesect.para: Pointer to entry if found, NULL otherwise.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, SYN_INVALID_PARAM on invalid inputs.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_CANOpenNode *node, uint16_t index, uint8_t subindex, void *buf, size_t buf_size, size_t *out_len)
memberdef.name: syn_canopen_od_read

briefdescription.para: Directly read an entry from the Object Dictionary.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store read byte length.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, error code if not found or unauthorized.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_CANOpenNode *node, uint16_t index, uint8_t subindex, const void *data, size_t len)
memberdef.name: syn_canopen_od_write

briefdescription.para: Directly write an entry to the Object Dictionary.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, error code if not found or unauthorized.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_CANOpenNode *node, uint32_t cob_id, const uint8_t *data, uint8_t len)
memberdef.name: syn_canopen_process_rx

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, error code on failure.

briefdescription.para: Periodic timer update (call from tick thread or loop).

parameterdescription.para: Elapsed time since last update in milliseconds.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, SYN_INVALID_PARAM on invalid parameters.
true if a frame was popped, false if no frame pending.

briefdescription.para: CANopen DS301 Slave Protocol Engine implementation.
